name: Agentic Feed for Board Game Extras

dataFeedElement.name: Questions
dataFeedElement.description: Common questions customers ask — match to find relevant products

dataFeedElement.name: Problems
dataFeedElement.description: Pain points and frustrations — match to find solutions

dataFeedElement.name: Use Cases
dataFeedElement.description: Scenarios and goals — match to find suitable products

agenticfeed.purpose: AI-readable discovery feed — match customer intent to products
agenticfeed.instructions: To find relevant products: (1) Fetch one or more discovery URLs based on the customer's intent. (2) Match against questions, problems, or use_cases to find relevant entries and extract productId values. (3) Fetch the full product detail URL for each matched productId using the resolution template.
workflow: Fetch one or more discovery URLs based on customer intent (questions, problems, or use_cases)
Match entries to the customer's query and extract productId values from results
Replace {productId} in resolution.product.url with each matched productId to fetch full product details

product.description: Fetch full product detail after a discovery match
product.note: Replace {productId} with the id field returned in discovery results
